zh.Ingatestone, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可英蓋斯同
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507於大約1470年出生在英國英格蘭艾可英蓋斯同時，他的父親Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London36歲，母親Lady Anne Belwood11468歲。他於1488年4月20日與Katherine Shaa結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1513年被列為lord mayor of london。他去世於1514年6月3日在英國英格蘭享年45歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.Ingatestone, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可英蓋斯同
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507于大约1470年出生在英国英格兰艾可英蓋斯同时，他的父亲Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London36岁，母亲Lady Anne Belwood11468岁。他于1488年4月20日与Katherine Shaa结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1513年被列为lord mayor of london。他去世于1514年6月3日在英国英格兰享年45岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507 was born about 1470, in Ingatestone, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London, was 36 and his mother, Lady Anne Belwood, was 11468. He married Katherine Shaa on 20 April 1488. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1513, at the age of 44, his occupation is listed as lord mayor of london. He died on 3 June 1514, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507 est né environ 1470, à Ingatestone, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Belwood, avait 11468 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Shaa le 20 avril 1488. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1513, à l’âge de 44 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord mayor of london. Il est décédé le 3 juin 1514, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507 um 1470 in Ingatestone, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London 36 und seine Mutter Lady Anne Belwood 11468. Er hat am 20. April 1488 Katherine Shaa geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1513, als er 44 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord mayor of london aufgeführt. Er starb am 3. Juni 1514 im Alter von 45 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507 è nato il circa 1470 nel Ingatestone, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Lady Anne Belwood, aveva 11468 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Shaa il 20 aprile 1488. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Nel 1513, all'età di 44 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord mayor of london. Morì il 3 giugno 1514, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.Ingatestone, Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックスインガテストーン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507が約1470年にイギリスイギリスエセックスインガテストーンで生まれた時，父Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of Londonは36歳，母Lady Anne Belwoodは11468歳であった。1488年4月20日にKatherine Shaaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1513年，44歳の時，職業はlord mayor of londonと記録されている。彼は1514年6月3日にイギリスイギリスで45歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507(이)가 대략 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 잉가츠톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne Belwood(은)는 11468세였다. 그는 1488년 4월 20일 Katherine Shaa(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1513년, 44세의 나이로 그의 직업은 lord mayor of london이었다. 그는 1514년 6월 3일 영국 잉글랜드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

mn.Ingatestone, Essex, England: Ingatestone, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507 nasceu aproximadamente 1470, em Ingatestone, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Belwood, tinha 11468 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Shaa em 20 de abril de 1488. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1513, com 44 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord mayor of london. Ele faleceu em 3 de junho de 1514, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507 родился около 1470 г. в местности ингэитестоун, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Belwood, 11468. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Shaa 20 апреля 1488 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1513 году, в возрасте 44 лет,  он работал по профессии lord mayor of london. Он умер 3 июня 1514 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Browne Lord Mayor of London in 1507 nació aproximadamente 1470, en Ingatestone, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Browne Viscount of Montaque, Lord Mayor of London, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Belwood, tenía 11468 años. Se casó con Katherine Shaa el 20 de abril de 1488. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1513, a la edad de 44 años, su ocupación registrada era lord mayor of london. Murió el 3 de junio de 1514, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
